title: TrendFit 1.4 Beta — Challenges Are Here
body: TrendFit v1.4.0 is now available in beta on TestFlight. This release introduces **TrendFit Challenges** — a major new feature for setting and tracking personal fitness goals.

• **Create personal challenges** through a guided 7-step flow: choose a scope (trend-wide or a specific workout type), metric, duration, target value, and start date, then review everything before saving.

• **Smart target pre-population**: the target value is pre-filled from your HealthKit history — cumulative trends (energy, distance) project a scaled total; rate-based trends (heart rate, pace, cadence) suggest your historical average.
• **Edit and delete challenges** after creation. In-progress targets and durations are editable with a confirmation prompt; deletes require confirmation.
• **Name your challenges**: add an optional user-defined name (up to 40 characters) displayed as the headline on your Challenge Standings card.

• **Local push notifications** for challenge progress updates. Configure the frequency in App Settings (daily, every 3 days, weekly, or custom). All notifications are on-device only — no external services.
Try it out on TestFlight and let us know what you think!

title: Version 1.3 Now Available! ✨
body: **TrendFit 1.3 is now live on the App Store!** This release brings important polish and performance improvements based on beta tester feedback.
**What's New:**
• **Smoother Navigation** – Eliminated screen flashing and visual glitches between views
• **Better Onboarding** – Clear, helpful guidance for new users starting their fitness journey
• **Chart Improvements** – Data points now display correctly across all time periods
• **Performance Boost** – Faster chart rendering and smoother scrolling with large workout histories
A huge thank you to our beta testing community for helping make TrendFit more polished and reliable!
**Update now** to experience the improvements.

title: Beta Update: Smoother Experience + Polish ✨
body: **New beta build available!** This update brings important polish improvements:
• **Smoother Navigation** – No more screen flashing between views
• **Better Onboarding** – Clear guidance for new users without workout data
• **Chart Fixes** – Data points now display correctly across all time periods
• **Performance** – Smoother scrolling with large workout histories
Thanks to your feedback, TrendFit keeps getting better!

title: TrendFit is Now Available on the App Store! 🎉
body: **We did it!** TrendFit is now available for download on the App Store.
**What's included in version 1.0:**
• **TrendFit** – Compare multiple trends (Active Energy, Heart Rate, Pace, and more) for a single workout type
• **TrendFitStack** – Compare one trend across multiple workout types with daily, weekly, monthly, and annual views
• **Zoomable Charts** – Pinch to zoom, pan, and tap data points for detailed insights
• **Privacy-First** – All analysis happens on-device. Your health data never leaves your iPhone
• **Personalization** – Choose your preferred units, chart windows, and haptic feedback
A huge thank you to our Founding Members and Beta Testers who helped shape TrendFit into what it is today. Your feedback has been invaluable.
**Ready to start tracking your trends?** Download TrendFit from the App Store today!

title: Public Beta + Members Forum Now Live 🚀
body: Big milestone — **TrendFit** is now available on Apple TestFlight!
• **Founding Members:** continue to use your private TestFlight invite and now share ideas directly with us in the new **Members Forum**.
• **Public Beta Testers:** anyone can now join the beta through our new public TestFlight link.
• All beta feedback will be submitted through the TestFlight app itself.
Thank you for helping us shape TrendFit into the best way to track and understand your workouts.

title: App Store Connect Approval ✅
body: Great news — **TrendFit** has been approved in App Store Connect.
**What's next:**
• We're opening **external TestFlight** for Founding Members first.
• Watch your inbox for a TestFlight invite (from Apple).
• Install the **TestFlight** app and accept the invite to join the beta.
• Share bugs & ideas via our **Beta Feedback** page (Founding Members only).
• Founding sign-ups remain open until **October 11, 2025**.

title: Project Update: Beta focus for 2025
body: We're focusing the initial public beta on TrendFit and TrendFitStack to keep things fast, simple, and stable.
TrendFitChallenge is deferred until after we ship a solid first beta and collect feedback.
Apple requires a one-time external TestFlight review for the first public beta build.

title: Feature Spotlight: TrendFitStack
body: Compare a single trend (like Active Energy) across multiple workout types—Running, Walking, Hiking, and more.
Flip between daily, weekly, monthly, and annual views, and stack totals to see the bigger picture.

title: Privacy Policy Published
body: TrendFit reads Apple HealthKit data on-device and does not upload your health data to servers.
You can review the full policy any time on our site.

title: Founding Member Program
body: Founding Member signups are open now and will close in the coming months.
Join early to follow progress and help shape the direction of TrendFit.
